summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Heavy Equipment Hire & Agreement App. Backend APIs working excellently (19/20 tests passed, 95% success rate). Frontend UI loads perfectly with professional design and complete integration. All key workflows tested successfully including login, equipment browsing, agreement creation, inquiries, and role-based access control.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 403 instead of expected 401 for unauthenticated requests
minor_issues.impact: Very minor - still correctly blocks unauthorized access, just different status code

passed_tests: Backend API health check and root endpoints
Data seeding (6 machines, admin/staff users, terms)
Landing page loads with equipment fleet display
Dashboard with statistics and recent agreements
Equipment Fleet page with all 6 machines
Agreement detail page with tabs (Details, Checklist, Photos, Signature)
Customer Inquiry form with equipment selection
Role-based access control (staff cannot access Settings)
action_item_for_main_agent: No critical issues found. The app is working excellently. Optional minor fix: Update unauthorized endpoint to return 401 instead of 403 status code for consistency, but this is very low priority as security is still working correctly.
